surface_verification.justification: Framework-internal change: a new shared CLI tool (ensure_current.py) wrapping integrate_main, plus runtime-prompt prose (F11.md, campaign-mode.md, SKILL.md) and docs. No web/UI/API application surface and no backend-affects-frontend path. Behavior verified end-to-end by the unit/functional suite: ensure_current is driven through the REAL integrate_main against a real bare-origin + linked worktree for all three outcomes (no-op / integrate+regenerate / blocked) and its CLI is exercised (test_ensure_current.py), and the F11/campaign prose contracts are drift-pinned (test_f11_automerge_arm.py, test_campaign_serial_drain.py).
